19.gl: arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament
19.kj: excellency, haughtiness, highness, pride, proudly, swelling.

19.gl: to tie fast; hence (of the mouth) to be tongue-tied
19.kj: bind, be dumb, put to silence.

19.dv: from H6275 (עָתַק) in the sense of license;

20.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
20.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

20.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
20.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
20.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

20.gl: abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality)
20.kj: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (shi

20.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
20.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

20.gl: to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk
20.kj: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place).

20.gl: good (as a noun), in the widest sense, especially goodness (superlative concretely, the best), beauty, gladness, welfare
20.kj: fair, gladness, good(-ness, thing, -s), joy, go well with.

21.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
21.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
21.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

21.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
21.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
21.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

21.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
21.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
21.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

21.gl: to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk
21.kj: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place).

21.gl: a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense)
21.kj: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).
[phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

22.gl: properly, perhaps to separate, i.e. distinguish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to be (causatively, make) great, difficult, wonderful
22.kj: accomplish, (arise...too, be too) hard, hidden, things too high, (be, do, do a, shew) marvelous(-ly, -els, things, work), miracles, perform, separate, make singular, (be, great, ma

22.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
22.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

22.gl: something hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of besiegers), (abstractly) a siege, (figuratively) distress; or (subjectively) a fastness
22.kj: besieged, bulwark, defence, fenced, fortress, siege, strong (hold), tower.

22.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
22.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

22.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
22.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
22.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

23.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
23.kj: affliction, outward appearance, [phrase] before, [phrase] think best, colour, conceit, [phrase] be content, countenance, [phrase] displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, [phra

23.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
23.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

23.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
23.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
23.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

23.gl: properly, to be free; but used only causatively and reflexively, to halloo (for help, i.e. freedom from some trouble)

24.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
24.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

24.gl: properly, to build up or support; to foster as a parent or nurse; figuratively to render (or be) firm or faithful, to trust or believe, to be permanent or quiet; morally to be true or certain;
24.kj: hence, assurance, believe, bring up, establish, [phrase] fail, be faithful (of long continuance, stedfast, sure, surely, trusty, verified), nurse, (-ing father), (put), trust, turn
24.dv: a primitive root; (Isaiah 30:21; interchangeable with H541 (אָמַן), to go to the right hand)

24.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
24.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

24.gl: properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free)
24.kj: [phrase] abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with.

24.gl: to guard, in a good sense (to protect, maintain, obey, etc.) or a bad one (to conceal, etc.)
24.kj: besieged, hidden thing, keep(-er, -ing), monument, observe, preserve(-r), subtil, watcher(-man).

24.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
24.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
